summary: Iteration 30 - Frontend Catalog Browser testing complete. All 16 features tested and passed. Verified: (1) Login with admin@aic.it/Admin123! works. (2) Catalog page accessible via /catalog route. (3) 'Catalogo' visible in sidebar with BookOpen icon and 'Procedure disponibili' hint. (4) 5 category cards with correct counts: Fiscale(7), Previdenziale(2), Societario(1), Documentale(7), Informativo(3). (5) 'Ufficiale' badge on official categories (fiscale, previdenziale, societario). (6) Category card click filters procedures to that category only. (7) Search bar filters by name, entity (Agenzia delle Entrate), and action (Apertura Partita IVA). (8) Filter tabs Tutte/Ufficiali/Interne work correctly. (9) Expanded VAT_OPEN_PF shows CHI FA COSA with 'Herion prepara', 'Tu invii', 'Risposta ente attesa'. (10) Expanded shows AZIONE UFFICIALE with label, description, entity, form reference. (11) Expanded shows DOCUMENTI RICHIESTI with name, why_needed, format, mandatory badge. (12) Expanded shows AUTENTICAZIONE: SPID, RICEVUTA ATTESA with timing, TEMPISTICA with duration. (13) 'Avvia questa procedura' CTA button navigates to /practices/new?type=VAT_OPEN_PF. (14) Internal procedures (STATUS_UPDATE) show 'Interna' badge. (15) Internal procedures do NOT show 'Avvia questa procedura' button. (16) Empty state 'Nessuna procedura trovata' shown when search returns no results.
critical_code_review_comments: CatalogPage.jsx correctly implements category cards with data-testid='category-{id}' for testing
ProcedureCard component properly shows/hides 'Avvia questa procedura' CTA based on procedure_type
Search filters correctly match name, official_action.entity_name, and official_action.label fields
Filter tabs (Tutte/Ufficiali/Interne) correctly filter by procedure_type
Layout.jsx correctly includes 'Catalogo' in sidebar with BookOpen icon and proper data-testid
api.js includes getCatalog and getCatalogCategories endpoints
seed_data_creation: Used existing catalog seed data (20 entries seeded on startup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 tested the frontend catalog browser. All 16 features passed. Key verified features: (1) Catalog page at /catalog with 5 category cards showing correct procedure counts. (2) Category cards have data-testid='category-{id}' and clicking toggles filter. (3) Procedure cards have data-testid='procedure-{practice_id}' and expand on click. (4) Expanded official procedures show CHI FA COSA, AZIONE UFFICIALE, DOCUMENTI RICHIESTI, AUTENTICAZIONE/RICEVUTA/TEMPISTICA sections. (5) CTA button data-testid='create-from-{practice_id}' navigates to /practices/new?type={practice_id}. (6) Internal procedures show 'Interna' badge and NO CTA button. (7) Search filters by name, entity, action. (8) Filter tabs work correctly. (9) Empty state shown when no results.

details: 'Catalogo' visible in sidebar with BookOpen icon and 'Procedure disponibili' hint
'Ufficiale' badge shown on Fiscale, Previdenziale, Societario categories
Clicking category card filters to that category only
Search by entity (Agenzia delle Entrate) works
Search by action (Apertura Partita IVA) works
VAT_OPEN_PF shows 'Herion prepara', 'Tu invii', 'Risposta ente attesa'
Shows label, description, entity (Agenzia delle Entrate), form reference (Modello AA9/12)
Shows document name, why_needed, format, mandatory badge (Obbligatorio)
RICEVUTA ATTESA: Numero di protocollo rilasciato dal portale (Immediata)
'Avvia questa procedura' button present for official procedures
Internal procedures do NOT show 'Avvia questa procedura' button
'Nessuna procedura trovata' message shown when search returns no results
